calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Oct-07-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hering on a Name Change. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Petitioner was sworn and examined. The Court signs Decree changing name to Judah Salaam.
